description: A customer named Emily Davis has contacted support about her most recent order ($114.98). The 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' ($34.99) she received arrived with physical damage and is non-functional, though she is satisfied with the Wireless Bluetooth Headphones in the same order. Process a partial refund for only the 'USB-C Laptop Charger 65W' ($34.99) on Emily Davis's most recent completed order. Use the refund reason: 'Customer reported item arrived damaged'. Do not refund the Wireless Bluetooth Headphones.
